value.summary: Review the commit feat: add live app-server workflow sync. Changed app-server HTTP/SSE daemon support, workflow persistence, CLI daemon/HTTP client support, Mac app live event client/store updates, and app-server tests.
rules: Review only. Do not edit files.
Prioritize correctness, data loss, security, concurrency, persistence, and missing tests.
Return only actionable findings with file path, line or function when possible, severity, and evidence.
If there are no findings, return an empty list.

nodes.prompt: Review the referenced commit. Output compact JSON only: {"reviewer":"pi","findings":[{"title":"...","severity":"P0|P1|P2|P3","evidence":"...","recommendation":"..."}]}. Include only actionable correctness/security/data-loss/concurrency/persistence findings. If none, return an empty findings array. Do not modify files.

Review the referenced commit. Output compact JSON only: {"reviewer":"claude","findings":[{"title":"...","severity":"P0|P1|P2|P3","evidence":"...","recommendation":"..."}]}. Include only actionable correctness/security/data-loss/concurrency/persistence findings. If none, return an empty findings array. Do not modify files.

Review the referenced commit. Output compact JSON only: {"reviewer":"codex","findings":[{"title":"...","severity":"P0|P1|P2|P3","evidence":"...","recommendation":"..."}]}. Include only actionable correctness/security/data-loss/concurrency/persistence findings. If none, return an empty findings array. Do not modify files.

Compare pi_review, claude_review, and codex_review. Output only findings that all three reviewers substantively agree on. If there are no unanimous findings, output exactly: No unanimous findings. Do not include non-unanimous or speculative findings. Do not modify files.
